subject: [PATCH v3 1/2] EVM: add comment describing why ino field is still unsigned long

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a comment to the EVM code explaining why the inode number field 'ino' remains an unsigned long, despite the inode->i_ino being widened to a u64. The reason is to allow existing HMAC and signatures from 32-bit hosts to continue working when the inode number fits within a 32-bit value.
